source_policy: fully authored Blender armored Sherman geometry; boxmodel v1-13 is baseline; hero v1 is rejected red evidence; no Meshy chassis or turret imports
uv_policy: box and planar UV plates with broad paintable armor surfaces and decal-friendly material families; no packed atlas

orientation_contract.authored_axes: X forward/back, Y up/down, Z left/right
orientation_contract.threejs_axes_after_gltf: X forward/back, Y up/down, Z left/right
orientation_contract.visual_regression_prevented: track cleats must remain behind continuous outer skirts; front/rear sponson gaps must be covered by armored returns; coaxial MG must be visible and parented to cannon elevation pivot

runtime_contract.cannon_elevation: rotate cannon_elevation_pivot for mantlet, barrel, and coaxial MG pitch
runtime_contract.coaxial_mg: coaxial_mg is parented to cannon_elevation_pivot and seated beside the main barrel through the mantlet
runtime_contract.tread_motion: scroll material maps on left_track_motion and right_track_motion; visible cleats are recessed behind skirt silhouette
runtime_contract.wheel_motion: rotate children of left_roadwheel_group and right_roadwheel_group
runtime_contract.hull_track_relationship: continuous outer skirts, under-sponson backing, and front/rear armored returns cover the track wells so the tank reads as armor-covered rather than a comb of exposed track blocks

red_build_context.rejected: authored_sherman_hero_v1 v1-1 exposed comb-like track blocks and obvious armor gaps
red_build_context.forbidden_success_claim: node, token, route, or bbox overlap without visible cloud/Sense comparison against old boxmodel and rejected hero
